backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Vijay Online Centre backend, defining application lifecycle management (submit, set fee, verify payment, approve/reject), user profiles, services, and manager notifications with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (refresh button fix, submission count fix, Set Price auth fix, admin login credentials) to their relevant source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON map of frontend source file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, setting the page title to 'Vijay Online Centre' and mounting the React root via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that manages page routing between home, payment, dashboard, and admin pages, handles admin authentication gating with a login modal, and wraps the app in React Query and Toaster providers.
Modal component for admin login that submits credentials via the async useAdminAuth login hook, displays errors on failure, and calls onSuccess when authentication succeeds.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: A floating chat widget fixed to the bottom-left that lets users send messages and receive bot responses, with quick-reply buttons, typing indicator, bold text formatting, and a WhatsApp link.
frontend/src/components/CustomerAuthModa: A two-step modal for customer login via mobile number and OTP, generating a random OTP client-side, validating input, and calling loginWithMobile on successful verification.
A secondary floating support chat button fixed to the bottom-right that opens a compact chat panel with message history, a WhatsApp direct-link banner, and a text input for sending messages.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying brand info, contact details (phone, WhatsApp, hours, location), UPI payment ID, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky top navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and a customer auth section that shows login/logout controls based on authentication state, toggling a CustomerAuthModal.
Displays a 5-stage application progress tracker with horizontal layout on desktop and vertical on mobile, visually distinguishing completed, active, and future stages.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) modes, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Provides admin authentication with hardcoded credentials (vijay/123 and vijay/2026), storing a 24-hour session token in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerAuth.ts: Manages customer authentication state persisted in localStorage for 30 days, with login/logout helpers and OTP generation utility.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout state and identity to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profiles, applications CRUD, and a simple keyword-based chatbot with FAQ responses.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS base styles and a navy-blue/white CSS custom property theme (with dark mode variant) for the Vijay Online Centre app.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all applications with stats, and allows admins to set fees, confirm payments, reject applications, and update application stages.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Customer-facing dashboard page that lets users look up an application by ID, view its status with icons and a progress tracker, and submit a UPI payment transaction ID when a fee is set.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page displaying a searchable, filterable grid of 32 government/business services organized by category, with customer authentication modal integration for navigating to service application pages.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Multi-step application submission page where users enter their details, optionally upload documents, and submit the application (with or without files) generating a unique app ID on success.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom navy color palette, Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, CSS-variable-based semantic colors, custom shadows, and fade/accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking version, architectural notes, known issues (mobile refresh bug, active count display, Set Price unauthorized error), and a list of existing feature fix requests with their requirement IDs.
